scope_assets: Cloud Identity and Mobility Management Service
exclusions: Okta is a cloud-based identity service that connects people to their applications from any device
anytime. The Okta Identity Cloud provides directory services
mobile device management and API access management. It comes with built-in reporting
reward_range: If the debug mode doesn't show up, completely close out the application and retry.
